system.name: structured-task-row-system
system.goal: Create highly consistent, scanable, reusable task row components with strong spacing rhythm, predictable alignment, and scalable layout behavior.
designPrinciples: Use shared spatial primitives across all components
Prefer reusable layout rules over component-specific styling
Ensure every component follows the same spacing scale
Optimize for scalability and AI generation consistency

principles: All interactive rows should follow a predictable vertical rhythm
Rows should maintain consistent internal alignment regardless of content
Visual grouping should rely on spacing instead of borders
Horizontal layout should use dedicated semantic columns
Text and actions should never compete visually
Secondary metadata should remain visually quieter than primary content

aiGenerationRules: Never place metadata randomly around title
Use shared sizing tokens across all components
Ensure scanability at all viewport widths
